payload.answer: This looks additive rather than conflicting: the new fact can be kept alongside the existing one, or you can leave the current memory unchanged.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

keep_existing: retain only the current memory about Bill Evans and ignore the new fact.
edit: rewrite the memory to include both Bill Evans and Sonny Rollins, if that is the intended combined preference.
